articles.title: Stock market today: S&P 500, Nasdaq, Dow futures rise as tech earnings continue to impress - Yahoo Finance
articles.description: Major gauge futures soared following a series of record closes from US indexes.

articles.title: Wegovy pill sales smash forecasts after launch as Novo Nordisk hikes guidance - CNBC

articles.description: Disney's second-quarter earnings report comes less than two months after Josh D'Amaro took the helm as CEO.

articles.title: FDA approves fruit-flavored vapes for first time after reported Trump pressure - Fox Business
articles.description: The FDA for the first time authorized non-tobacco-flavored vaping products, approving fruit-flavored e-cigarette pods made by Los Angeles-based Glas Inc.

articles.title: Federal officials will test Google and Microsoft AI models before release - The Washington Post

articles.title: Delta is slashing free snacks and drinks from about 450 short-haul daily flights - qz.com
articles.description: Starting May 19, flights of 349 miles or less will no longer receive any food or beverage service, affecting about 9% of daily departures

articles.title: UnitedHealthcare to remove prior authorization for 30% of services - USA Today

articles.title: 'Ask for a little more': Chipotle CEO, customers at odds over portions - USA Today
articles.description: For the second time in as many years, Chipotle leadership is telling customers to simply ask for larger portions. But they internet isn't buying it.

articles.title: Apple Will Pay $250M to Settle Allegations It Misled iPhone Buyers About AI - CNET
articles.description: Those who bought select iPhone models could collect up to $95 each.

articles.description: The plaintiffs allege that Meta CEO and founder Mark Zuckerberg “personally authorized and actively encouraged” copyright infringement.

articles.description: The new footage shows the packed plane clearly coming in too low.
